channel.title: Giampaolo Rodola - rant
channel.description: Python enthusiast, core developer, psutil author

item.title: Goodbye Google Code, I am moving to GitHub
item.description: 8 years ago I started hosting my first open source project (pyftpdlib, code.google.com/p/pyftpdlib) on Google Code and I later ended up also hosting psutil (code.google.com/p/psutil) and pysendfile (code.google.com/p/pysendfile). Back then GC had just been released and similarly to …
item.dc:creator: Giampaolo Rodola
